title: dryopteris pontica
intro: Dryopteris pontica, also known as Pontic scaly male fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and swelling. The health benefits of Dryopteris pontica include its ability to improve respiratory function, lower blood pressure, and reduce the risk of certain diseases, such as cancer and diabetes. Dryopteris pontica can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
